name: Abiotic Factor
author: ops@refx.example
description: Co-op sci-fi survival in a secret research facility. SteamCMD Windows dedicated server run via Wine.
startupCommand: xvfb-run -a wine ./AbioticFactor/Binaries/Win64/AbioticFactorServer-Win64-Shipping.exe -log -useperfthreads -NoAsyncLoadingThread -MaxServerPlayers={{MAX_PLAYERS}} -Port={{SERVER_PORT}} -QueryPort={{QUERY_PORT}} -ServerPassword="{{SERVER_PASSWORD}}" -SteamServerName="{{SERVER_NAME}}" & APID=$!; sleep 8; tail -n+1 -F ./AbioticFactor/Saved/Logs/AbioticFactor.log 2>/dev/null & wait $APID

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd image ships no `steamcmd` on PATH; bootstrap
# it so the egg's steamcmd calls resolve (otherwise the server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 2857200 validate +quit
echo 'Abiotic Factor install complete.'
